title_en: NVIDIA NVLink: The Scale-Up Network for AI Factories
summary_zh: 随着AI需求的持续增长，工作负载变得更大，模型日益复杂，AI计算的部署压力也不断加大。NVIDIA NVLink作为一种扩展型网络技术，能够支持更大规模的AI计算集群，提升数据传输速度和带宽，满足未来AI工厂的需求。
summary_en: As AI demand continues to accelerate with larger workloads and more complex models, deployment pressure for AI compute grows. NVIDIA NVLink is a scale-up network technology designed to support larger AI compute clusters by enhancing data transfer speed and bandwidth, addressing the needs of future AI factories.
why_it_matters_zh: NVIDIA NVLink通过提供高带宽、低延迟的连接，解决了大型AI模型训练和推理中的数据传输瓶颈，是实现高效AI工厂计算的关键技术。
why_it_matters_en: NVIDIA NVLink addresses data transfer bottlenecks in training and inference of large AI models by providing high bandwidth and low latency connections, making it a key technology for efficient AI factory computing.

title_zh: JEPA预测器：一种用于遮挡特征补全的可迁移算子
title_en: The JEPA Predictor: A Transferable Operator for Occluded Feature Completion
summary_zh: 本文提出的联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）训练一个预测器与编码器共同工作，但实际应用时只用编码器的特征。该预测器是从可见上下文特征到被遮挡位置特征的学习算子，我们验证这个算子可以跨编码器家族迁移。通过将冻结的I-JEPA和V-JEPA 2预测器通过单线性投影接入多种非JEPA编码器（CLIP、DINOv3、DINOv2、MAE），在ImageNet-9和Stanford Dogs数据集上对遮挡特征完成任务表现出显著提升，尤其在重遮挡情况下效果最佳。该方法不需重新训练模型，仅需针对不同遮挡比例拟合线性映射，展现了JEPA预测器作为遮挡特征补全的通用算子的潜力。
summary_en: The paper introduces Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) where a predictor is trained jointly with an encoder but discarded during downstream tasks. This predictor functions as a learned operator completing features at masked (occluded) positions from visible context. The study demonstrates that this operator can be transferred across different encoder families by connecting frozen JEPA predictors (I-JEPA and V-JEPA 2) to non-JEPA encoders (CLIP, DINOv3, DINOv2, MAE) via a single linear projection fitted on limited data. Experiments on ImageNet-9 and Stanford Dogs datasets show consistent improvements in occluded feature completion, particularly under heavy masking, without retraining any model parts, revealing the JEPA predictor as a portable operator for occlusion completion.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究提出了一个创新且高效的特征补全方法，能跨模型家族迁移且无需重新训练，为遮挡图像理解和特征利用带来重要突破。
why_it_matters_en: This work offers an innovative and efficient feature completion approach that is transferable across model families without retraining, representing a significant advancement for occluded image understanding and feature utilization.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: The JEPA Predictor: A Transferable Operator for Occluded Feature Completion. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 62.

title_zh: 迈向可信风险感知人脸检索（RA-FR）的一步
title_en: A Step Forward Towards Trustworthy Risk-Aware Facial Retrieval (RA-FR)
summary_zh: 在人脸图像检索中，尤其是在不受控制的监控环境下，错过关注目标（单个假阴性）是不可接受的。现有系统虽在标准测试中表现优异，但在实际环境中如低分辨率、运动模糊及光照不佳时表现欠佳。本文提出风险感知人脸检索（RA-FR）框架，通过自适应检索集生成，保证在用户指定风险水平和置信度下包含真实目标。方法结合了基于盲复原的混合模型减少数据不确定性、利用自监督ViT特征提取及服从Hoeffding不等式的可证校准机制，实现了在IMFDB数据集上5%风险目标下仅约10张图片的平均检索集大小。该框架融合了领域复原、鲁棒特征学习及可验证决策规则，使监控人脸检索更加可靠且可审计。代码已公开。
summary_en: Facial image retrieval in uncontrolled surveillance settings demands zero tolerance for missing subjects of interest. Despite strong results on curated benchmarks, current methods struggle under real-world domain shifts like low resolution and motion blur. We introduce Risk-Aware Facial Retrieval (RA-FR), which adapts the retrieval set dynamically to guarantee inclusion of ground truth at a user-defined risk and confidence level. RA-FR integrates (1) hybrid blind face restoration to reduce data uncertainty, (2) discriminative and robust feature extraction via self-supervised ViT models, and (3) conformal prediction with Hoeffding’s inequality to calibrate set sizes based on query uncertainty. On the IMFDB benchmark, RA-FR meets a 5% risk target with an average retrieval set size around 10 images. This unified pipeline provides a reliable and auditable facial retrieval solution for surveillance. Code is publicly available.
why_it_matters_zh: 该工作针对现实监控环境中因低质和环境变化带来的识别不可靠性，提出了风险控制框架，结合多项先进技术确保检索结果的高可靠性和可审计性，具有实际应用价值。
why_it_matters_en: This work addresses the challenge of unreliable facial recognition under real-world conditions by proposing a risk-controlled retrieval framework that combines state-of-the-art restoration, robust representation, and provable confidence calibration, making surveillance facial retrieval both reliable and auditable with practical significance.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: A Step Forward Towards Trustworthy Risk-Aware Facial Retrieval (RA-FR). Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 76.

title_zh: RLHF偏好数据中的评分者状态偏差：审计框架
title_en: Rater State Bias in RLHF Preference Data: An Audit Framework
summary_zh: 本文识别出强化学习中基于人类反馈（RLHF）中的一种结构性混淆：评分者的偏好标签不仅反映输出比较，也可能反映评分者在注释时的状态。持续的压力或困扰条件下，评分者的偏好会随时间变化，导致偏好数据同时编码评分者状态和质量判断。这种状态相关偏差可跨评分者共享，并通过奖励建模和策略优化传播。文章提出了评分者状态偏差的假设和审计框架，定义了相关概念，提出可测量指标并提供审计协议及试点方案，旨在公开模型中检测这种结构性偏差。
summary_en: This paper identifies a structured confound in Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF): pairwise preference labels may reflect not only output comparisons but also the rater's state during annotation. Under sustained stress or distress, raters' preferences can shift over time, encoding rater state alongside quality judgments. Such bias can be shared among annotators and propagate through reward modeling and policy optimization. The authors propose the concept of rater state bias, develop an audit framework with definitions, measurable indicators, falsifiable predictions, and an audit protocol to detect this bias in publicly available instruction-tuned models, aiming to isolate a testable source of structured bias in RLHF data.
why_it_matters_zh: RLHF作为训练大型语言模型的重要方法，其偏好数据的结构性偏差可能影响模型表现与公平性。识别并审计评分者状态偏差，有助于改进数据质量，提升RLHF训练的可靠性和模型的稳定性。
why_it_matters_en: As a key method for training large language models, RLHF's preference data can harbor structured biases affecting model performance and fairness. Identifying and auditing rater state bias helps improve data quality, enhances the reliability of RLHF training, and contributes to more stable and trustworthy AI models.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Rater State Bias in RLHF Preference Data: An Audit Framework. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 63.

title_zh: 掩码扩散语言模型：强大且可引导的基于文本的世界模型用于智能强化学习
title_en: Masked Diffusion Language Models are Strong and Steerable Text-Based World Models for Agentic RL
summary_zh: 本文提出将基于文本的世界建模形式化为可引导的转移动力学问题，结合初始状态、任务上下文、工具模式、领域规则和引导指令。通过对比自回归语言模型（AR LMs）和掩码扩散语言模型（MDLMs），发现MDLMs在保持推理延迟相当的情况下，凭借双向锚定感知的去噪能力，在连贯性、基础性和多样性上显著优于参数量是其4倍的LLMs。使用239,403条跨九个开源环境和多个模型家族的状态-动作轨迹进行训练，并通过零样本迁移实验展示在三个超出分布环境中，对不同规模代理骨干实现最高47%的性能提升。研究还分析了对抗场景下的失败模式，并通过人类评估验证了模型输出的真实性和实用性。该工作已开源，旨在促使相关方向研究进展。
summary_en: This paper formalizes text-based world modeling as a steerable transition-dynamics problem integrating initial states, task context, tool schemas, domain rules, and steering directives. By comparing autoregressive language models (AR LMs) with masked diffusion language models (MDLMs), it finds MDLMs achieve better coherence, groundedness, and rollout diversity than LLMs with over four times their parameter size, while maintaining comparable inference latency, thanks to bidirectional anchor-aware denoising. The study uses 239,403 grounded state-action trajectories across nine open-source environments and multiple model families for training. Zero-shot transfer experiments on three out-of-distribution environments demonstrate up to 47% absolute gains over baselines without environment-specific fine-tuning across various 1.2B to 7B parameter agent backbones. Behavioral failure modes under adversarial conditions and human evaluations on realism and correctness are also analyzed. The code is open-sourced to foster further research.
why_it_matters_zh: 强化学习对多样化、专门化训练环境的需求不断增加，现有的手工设计环境难以满足更高模型性能下的训练需求。传统的自回归世界模型存在从左到右的偏差，限制了对全局依赖状态的条件建模能力。掩码扩散语言模型通过双向建模克服这一限制，显著提升了模型的表现和泛化能力，对发展更强、更易引导的智能代理强化学习具有重要意义。
why_it_matters_en: Reinforcement learning increasingly demands diverse and specialized training environments, which handcrafted fixed-difficulty setups fail to provide as models scale. Autoregressive world models suffer from left-to-right bias, limiting conditioning on globally interdependent states. Masked diffusion language models overcome this via bidirectional modeling, greatly enhancing performance and generalization. This advancement is crucial for developing stronger, steerable agentic reinforcement learning systems.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Masked Diffusion Language Models are Strong and Steerable Text-Based World Models for Agentic RL. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
ranking_reason: Selected from authoritative primary source; quality score 79.

title_zh: 基于约束锚定的推理轨迹
summary_zh: 最新研究提出了一种神经符号框架——基于约束锚定的推理轨迹（CART），旨在解决多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在链式思维推理中错误雪崩的问题。该方法通过在自然语言推理步骤中交插符号约束断言，使用双重约束传播模块持续验证视觉内容及其逻辑一致性，一旦检测到矛盾即回退至最后的有效状态，从而显著降低错误传播。通过对开源模型微调并在五个基准测试中验证，CART将错误雪崩率从65%降至14%，GQA准确率提升4.6个百分点，同时保持推理开销较低。
summary_en: A new neuro-symbolic framework called Constraint-Anchored Reasoning Traces (CART) is proposed to mitigate error snowballing in autoregressive multimodal large language models (MLLMs). CART interleaves natural language reasoning with symbolic constraint assertions checked continuously by a dual-pronged constraint propagation module. Upon detecting contradictions, it backtracks to the last consistent checkpoint, preventing cascading errors. Fine-tuned on large datasets, CART reduces the snowball rate from 65% to 14%, improves GQA accuracy by 4.6 points, and achieves high F1 scores with minimal inference overhead across benchmarks.
why_it_matters_zh: 该方法通过将符号约束与自然语言推理结合，实现了早期错误检测与回溯，从根本上抑制了错误雪崩现象。这不仅提升了模型的推理准确性，也保持了自然语言推理的灵活性和效率，是多模态大模型领域的重要进展。
why_it_matters_en: By integrating symbolic constraints with natural language reasoning steps, this approach enables early error detection and backtracking, effectively preventing error snowballing. This enhances reasoning accuracy while maintaining flexibility and efficiency, representing a significant advancement in multimodal large language models.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Constraint-Anchored Reasoning Traces. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: BLAD：一份包含历史背景的孟加拉法律法案多语言数据集（1799年至2025年）
title_en: BLAD: A Historically Contextualized, Multilingual Dataset of Bangladeshi Legal Acts (1799 to 2025)
summary_zh: BLAD是一个精心整理的孟加拉法律法案数据集，涵盖1799年至2025年间的1,484部立法法案。每部法案包含全文、结构化章节和脚注，废止状态，以及链接相关统治政权、国家元首和当时法律框架的元数据。数据集包含英语、孟加拉语及混合语言文档，支持法律文本的时序和多语言分析。BLAD填补了南亚低资源民法区域在法律自然语言处理领域的空白。数据集在CC BY-SA 4.0协议下公开，地址为https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/sakhadib/bangladesh-legal-acts-dataset。
summary_en: BLAD is a curated dataset of 1,484 legislative acts from Bangladesh spanning 1799 to 2025. Each act includes full text, structured sections, footnotes, repeal status, and metadata linking it to the relevant regime, head of state, and legal framework at enactment. The corpus covers English, Bengali, and mixed-language documents, enabling temporal and multilingual analysis of statutory law. It addresses a resource gap in legal NLP for low-resource South Asian civil-law jurisdictions. The dataset is publicly available under CC BY-SA 4.0 at https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/sakhadib/bangladesh-legal-acts-dataset.
why_it_matters_zh: 此数据集为研究孟加拉及相似地区法律演变和多语言法律文本处理提供了宝贵资源，促进了法律NLP在低资源国家的应用与发展。
why_it_matters_en: This dataset provides a valuable resource for studying the legal evolution of Bangladesh and similar regions, advancing legal NLP in low-resource countries by supporting multilingual and historical legal text analysis.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: BLAD: A Historically Contextualized, Multilingual Dataset of Bangladeshi Legal Acts (1799 to 2025). Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 大型语言模型生成文本中的非风格特征
summary_zh: 来自arXiv的最新研究指出，大型语言模型（LLM）生成的文本在风格上与人类写作存在显著差异，呈现出独特的文本“感觉”。研究通过统计分析LLM文本中的n-gram分布，揭示了其风格缺陷，且由于高阶n-gram与语义内容相关，风格和语义问题难以完全分离。
summary_en: A recent arXiv study shows that text generated by large language models (LLMs) differs stylistically from human writing, resulting in a distinctive textual "feel." By analyzing the statistical distribution of n-grams in LLM-generated texts, the research reveals style deficiencies and concludes that style and semantic issues are intertwined, as higher-order n-grams correlate with semantic content.
why_it_matters_zh: 这一研究有助于深入理解LLM生成文本的局限，有助于改进模型以更好地模拟人类写作风格及语义丰富性。
why_it_matters_en: This study aids in understanding the limitations of LLM-generated text, which is valuable for improving models to better emulate human writing style and semantic richness.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Literary Non-Style in LLM-Generated Text. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 医生-患者对话的鲁棒总结：TalTech在Beyond Transcription挑战赛中的系统
title_en: Robust Summarization of Doctor-Patient Conversations: TalTech Systems for the Beyond Transcription Challenge
summary_zh: 本文介绍了TalTech团队参加Beyond Transcription挑战赛的成果，该挑战赛要求直接从长时间的医生-患者对话录音中生成SOAP笔记，无需中间转录。团队选用了开放权重的语音大语言模型，采用LoRA监督微调及基于挑战指标Open Medical Concept F1的DAPO强化学习，分别基于轻量级和重量级模型构建系统。系统在两个赛道均获得第一名，且独立评审显示其幻觉率最低，表明基于概念匹配指标的强化学习并未影响事实可靠性。研究还发现基于文本转录的微调可有效迁移至语音输入，增强了模型对不同领域真实录音的鲁棒性。
summary_en: This paper presents TalTech's submissions to the Beyond Transcription Challenge, which involves generating SOAP notes directly from long doctor-patient conversation recordings without intermediate transcription. They screened open-weight speech large language models and adapted Voxtral Mini (lightweight) and Voxtral Small (heavyweight) models using LoRA supervised fine-tuning followed by DAPO reinforcement learning with the Open Medical Concept F1 metric as reward. Their systems ranked first in both tracks, and independent evaluation showed the lowest hallucination rate among submissions, indicating that reinforcement learning focused on concept-matching does not compromise factual reliability. They also found that fine-tuning on text transcripts transfers well to speech input, improving robustness on out-of-domain real recordings.
why_it_matters_zh: 该工作展示了如何通过结合监督微调与基于任务指标的强化学习，有效提升复杂医疗对话的自动摘要质量，且保证内容的准确性与可靠性，是医疗人工智能领域的重要进展。
why_it_matters_en: This work demonstrates an effective approach combining supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning based on a task-specific metric to improve automatic summarization quality of complex medical dialogues while ensuring factual accuracy, marking a significant advance in medical AI.

title_zh: Grabette：一个用于记录机器人操作数据的开放系统
title_en: Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data
summary_zh: Grabette 是一个开放系统，旨在记录和管理机器人操作过程中的数据，为机器人学习和研究提供支持。该系统促进了机器人操控技术的发展，通过高质量的数据采集提升机器人的性能表现。
summary_en: Grabette is an open system designed to record and manage data during robot manipulation, supporting robot learning and research. The system promotes advancements in robotic manipulation by providing high-quality data collection to improve robot performance.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着机器人技术的发展，高质量的操作数据对于提升机器人智能和操作准确性至关重要。Grabette 为研究人员和开发者提供了一个开放且标准化的数据记录工具，推动了机器人领域的合作与进步。
why_it_matters_en: As robotics technology advances, high-quality manipulation data is crucial to enhance robots' intelligence and precision. Grabette offers researchers and developers an open and standardized data recording tool, facilitating collaboration and progress in the robotics field.
